#  View a Summary Preview of an Owner Invoice 
#####  In Beta
This page details the modernized owner invoice experience.
##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Prime Contracts** tool.
  2. Click the appropriate **Number** link to open the contract. 
#####  Note
**How to find a contract?** Use the **Search** and **Select a Column to Group** features to quickly find the contract.
  3. Click the **Invoices** tab.
  4. Locate the invoice to open in the **Invoices (Payment Applications)** table.
  5. Click the **Invoice #** link.
  6. Click the **General** tab.  
This is the active tab by default.
  7. Scroll to the **Summary Preview** card. Click the right arrow to expand the card.   
![Summary Preview](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e0edad769aff2b76918e26677c9c4724/a00aec0d20e965b7add1d7e358eb1c57/summary-preview.png?fm=webp)
  8. Scroll down the page to preview your project's data as it appears in the invoice.   
The image below is an example of the Summary Preview.   
![Summary Preview Expanded](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/055e5705c37a836244a59601b2174df6/455ae890b43b1461a65214161f0b74f8/summary-preview-expanded.png?fm=webp)
